board_csa_architect.notes: refresh_tokens table with family_id chain. Rotation pattern is industry standard. 15min access / 7d refresh / 30d absolute timeout.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Reuse Detection is critical for sovereign system. Nuclear option (family revocation) on stolen token reuse. Token hashing mandatory. Approve strongly.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI impact. Pure auth infrastructure. Token validation adds negligible latency.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Refresh token rotation adds DB writes but refresh_tokens table is small. Index on family_id for reuse detection queries. 30d absolute timeout prevents token sprawl.
